/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/curio.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/curio.dir/curio_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/ui/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/ui/AppItemDelegate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/ui/AppDetailsWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/ui/AppCardWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/ui/InstalledRowWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/ui/RuntimeUpdatesRowWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/models/AppListModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/models/OperationModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/backend/FlatpakBackend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/backend/FlatpakInstallationService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/backend/FlatpakRefMapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/backend/FlatpakTransactionRunner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/backend/FlatpakRemoteCatalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/backend/AppDisplayNames.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/backend/FlathubApiClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/backend/AppStreamProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/backend/GitHost.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/backend/TrackedBuildSource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/backend/TrackedBuildClassifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/backend/CurioSettings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/backend/TrackedBuildMatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/backend/CatalogCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/backend/SandboxedFlatpakEnv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/src/ui/TrackedBuildSetupDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/curio.dir/curio_autogen/3YJK5W5UP7/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o curio  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Concurrent.so.6.11.0 -lflatpak -lostree-1 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/lib/libAppStreamQt.so.1.1.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
